issues.sample: This incident just happened around 9:50pm. I have a 2024 ioniq 6 SEL with 2900 miles. I lost power to my motor while going below 45 mph. The gage that shows acceleration and recharge, zeroed out, showing absolutely nothing. Once I came to a complete stop, I had to restart the car

narrative.headline: What 2024 Hyundai Ioniq 6 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 36 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (56% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
